title: aspalathus retroflexa subsp. retroflexa
intro: Aspalathus retroflexa subsp. retroflexa, also known as Rooibos, is a shrub-like plant native to South Africa, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The medicinal properties of Aspalathus retroflexa subsp. retroflexa lie in its high antioxidant content, which includes aspalathin, a unique flavonoid compound that provides numerous health benefits. The health benefits of Rooibos tea, made from the plant, include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of insomnia and digestive issues. Rooibos tea can be prepared by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it is also available in herbal tea blends, capsules, and powder forms for convenient consumption.
